title: Add QAW
description: Enter words to capture quickly. Use AI to fill translation, description, and type, then save.

fill_validation.no_words: Enter at least one word before using AI fill.
fill_validation.word_too_long: A word must be at most 255 characters.
fill_validation.too_many_words: You can fill at most 20 words at once.

fill_global_error: Could not fill words. Check your learning language and try again.

fill_row_errors.AMBIGUOUS_WORD: This word is too ambiguous — add more context or fix spelling.

save_no_words: Enter at least one word to save.
save_no_language: Select a learning language in your profile before saving.
